research_brief: Evaluate incident response platforms for HIPAA-aligned healthcare SOC teams, focusing on evidence quality, deployment model, and audit-readiness.

findings.title: NIST Computer Security Incident Handling Guide (SP 800-61 Rev. 2)
findings.summary: Defines incident response lifecycle phases and emphasizes preparation, detection, analysis, containment, eradication, and recovery.

findings.title: HHS HIPAA Security Rule Guidance
findings.summary: Explains administrative, physical, and technical safeguards relevant for healthcare security operations and audit controls.

findings.title: Vendor X Healthcare Compliance Overview
findings.summary: Describes SOC 2 controls, audit log exports, and HIPAA control mapping for healthcare SOC teams.

findings.title: Vendor X Compliance Overview (Mirror)
findings.summary: Repeated coverage of the same compliance page with minor wording differences.

findings.title: Playoff Predictions Weekly
findings.summary: Sports predictions and team rankings for the upcoming playoffs.
